history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle selfie of two young people, likely a couple, sharing an intimate moment. The person on the left, wearing glasses and a green and cream corduroy hat with a smiley face patch, leans in towards the camera, their eyes visible behind the lenses. Their expression is soft and slightly tilted. The person on the right, with long dark hair, is also partially visible, their face turned slightly towards the left person, eyes looking towards the camera with a gentle gaze.

The lighting is dim and warm, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of their clothing and skin. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a car or a cozy room. The color palette is dominated by muted tones of green, cream, and dark grays, with the warm skin tones of the individuals providing a subtle contrast. The overall mood is intimate, affectionate, and relaxed, capturing a candid snapshot of a shared connection. The style is candid and personal, reminiscent of a spontaneous selfie taken among close friends or partners.
